properties.titulo_evento: Satellite images show scale of destruction in Venezuela earthquakes
properties.descricao: Satellite images show the before and after of parts of Venezuela left in ruins by two devastating quakes.

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes Iran for second day: Is it a violation of war powers resolution?
properties.descricao: Days after Congress tells Trump he needs to seek its approval or end Iran war, Trump returns to attacks. Is it legal?

properties.titulo_evento: ‘US trying to find its way out of MoU with Iran’
properties.descricao: Bahrain and Kuwait have condemned Iran’s retaliatory attacks after a second day of US strikes on Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran attacks Kuwait and Bahrain in response to US strikes
properties.descricao: US-Iran deal under strain as Kuwait and Bahrain condemn Iranian attacks in response to US strikes.

properties.titulo_evento: ‘Between pain and fear’: Gaza children bear cost of ongoing Israeli attacks
properties.descricao: Suffering of Gaza's children continues unabated due to Israeli attacks despite 'ceasefire' reached in October 2025.

properties.titulo_evento: In pictures: Race against time to rescue Venezuela earthquake survivors
properties.descricao: Time is running out in Venezuela's race to locate survivors as experts highlight the crucial 72-hour rescue window.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war day 121: Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait as US strikes near Hormuz
properties.descricao: US strikes Iran for a second day near Strait of Hormuz as Bahrain sounds sirens and Kuwait activates air defences.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuelan earthquake death toll rises amid increasingly dire search
properties.descricao: The death toll from Venezuela’s twin earthquakes has reached 1,430, with an estimated 51,000 people still missing.

properties.titulo_evento: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
properties.descricao: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.

properties.titulo_evento: In Caracas, this feels like the hardest moment in Venezuela's modern history
properties.descricao: Rescue teams are working ceaselessly to reach those trapped under rubble. But as hope fades, anger is growing.

properties.titulo_evento: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
properties.descricao: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel strikes southern Lebanon as Hezbollah condemns new deal
properties.descricao: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix
properties.descricao: Italy's PM was not long ago being called the "Trump whisperer", but their relationship has gone from public attacks to personal insults.

properties.titulo_evento: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
properties.descricao: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 920 people.

properties.titulo_evento: Bad Bunny lights up London with history-making stadium show
properties.descricao: Pride and a party as the Puerto Rican becomes the first Latin artist to headline a UK stadium.

properties.titulo_evento: What France gets wrong about air conditioning

properties.titulo_evento: New Caledonia election tests territory's future after unrest and deadlock
properties.descricao: New Caledonia goes to the poll on Sunday in crucial elections. The possibility of independence from France remains the central political issue, with today’s vote taking place peacefully. The election comes two years after plans to expand voting righ...

properties.titulo_evento: New US-Iran exchange of attacks threatens ceasefire
properties.descricao: Iran's Revolutionary Guard on Sunday launched attacks targeting Bahrain and Kuwait in response to US air strikes on 10 Iranian sites. The Islamic Republic threatened a “complete halt” to negotiations to end the war if Washington continues its attack...

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela death toll reaches 1,430

properties.titulo_evento: New Caledonia polls close in French territory's first provincial elections since 2019
properties.descricao: Voting in the French overseas territory of New Caledonia closed on Sunday, with a turnout of 54.42 per cent, as citizens participated in the archipelago's first provincial elections since 2019. The results of the election, initially planned for 2024...

properties.titulo_evento: Can solar power help Cuba survive the US oil blockade?
properties.descricao: As US restrictions on oil shipments have left Cuba struggling to secure fuel, China is helping the communist island accelerate one of the world's fastest solar transitions. Imports of solar panels and batteries have surged over the past year, allowi...

properties.titulo_evento: Europe swelters under record heat
properties.descricao: Tens of millions of people are enduring extreme temperatures across Europe as a deadly heatwave pushes eastward. Scientists say a heatwave of this intensity so early in the summer would have been virtually impossible without human-caused climate cha...

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela: Search enters its third day, the window for finding survivors is rapidly closing
properties.descricao: Search and rescue teams have pulled a nine-month-old baby and his mother from the rubble three days after two earthquakes struck Venezuela. The disaster has claimed more than 1,000 lives, and search efforts are still underway for the hundreds of peo...

properties.titulo_evento: Israel attacks Lebanon despite truce
properties.descricao: Despite the signing of a new framework agreement on Friday aimed at ending the conflict, fighting has continued in Lebanon. On Sunday, the Israeli military said it had killed Hezbollah militants and struck a rocket launcher near Nabatieh in southern...

properties.titulo_evento: Iran targets Gulf states in response to US strikes, testing fragile ceasefire
properties.descricao: Despite a fragile ceasefire, tensions between the United States and Iran remain high, with both sides accusing each other of violating the truce. Tehran says it has carried out a third consecutive day of retaliatory strikes against US military sites...

properties.titulo_evento: 'What are they waiting for?': Frustration grows at govt reponse as Venezuela quake death toll rises
properties.descricao: Frustration mounted in Venezuela's state of La Guaira on Saturday as rescuers and civilians used shovels, heavy equipment, ropes and bare hands to look for survivors of the devastating twin earthquakes that killed at least 1,430 people. Many citizen...

properties.titulo_evento: Rugby: Toulouse beats Montpellier to win fouth consecutive Top 14 title
properties.descricao: Toulouse clinched a ⁠fourth consecutive ​Top 14 title on Saturday with a 28-20 victory over Montpellier in ​the French championship final at the Stade de France, a match briefly halted for several minutes due to violent thunderstorms.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East live: Iran targets Bahrain and Kuwait in response to US strikes
properties.descricao: Iran's Revolutionary Guard on Sunday launched attacks targeting Bahrain and Kuwait in response to US air strikes on 10 Iranian sites. The Islamic Republic threatened a “complete halt” to negotiations to end the war if Washington continues its attack...

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Extreme heat heads east, Greens want air con
properties.descricao: The worst of the heat wave is moving east and starting to ease, but extreme heat warnings remain in place almost nationwide. A Green politician is calling for rapid installation of air conditioning in public facilities.

properties.titulo_evento: Argentina: Milei's top aide resigns over corruption scandal
properties.descricao: Manuel Adorni is mired in a corruption scandal but has denied wrongdoing. Javier Milei has defended Adorni, saying, "Manuel is innocent."

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela earthquakes: Nearly 7 million may be impacted — UN
properties.descricao: The projection includes up to two million people in the capital, Caracas. Rescue teams are racing against time to save survivors, three days after the twin quakes that killed 1,430 people. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine strikes Russian weapons plant, Moscow fuel hub
properties.descricao: The two attacks, in Volgograd and Vladimir regions, are part of President Zelenskyy's strategy to bring the war to the Russian people and force Putin into peace negotiations.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is the US targeting Germany's drug industry?
properties.descricao: A new trade probe is reigniting a long-running clash over who should pay for medical innovation. Washington argues Germans benefit from lower prices while US patients shoulder a disproportionate share of the costs.

properties.titulo_evento: Rome celebrates 80 years of Italy's iconic Vespa scooter
properties.descricao: Thousands of Vespa riders took to Rome's streets to mark Vespa's 80th birthday. The wasp-waisted scooter became a symbol of Italy's rebirth after World War II.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is Germany taking a big stake in a major tankmaker?
properties.descricao: The German government will buy a 40% stake in tankmaker KNDS. The deal is as much about control in the critical defense sector as it is about the Franco-German relationship.

properties.titulo_evento: Why Germany's Deutsche Bahn will face delays for many years
properties.descricao: Delayed, unreliable and forced into long detours due to construction: Germany no longer sets the pace when it comes to rail travel — and this is unlikely to change anytime soon. The company is mired in a deep crisis.

properties.titulo_evento: Military-age Ukrainian men could lose EU protection
properties.descricao: The European Commission has suggested withdrawing protection status for military-age Ukrainian males. A number of EU countries support the move — and so does Kyiv.

properties.titulo_evento: Vatican accuses EU of double standards on war
properties.descricao: Doctrinal chief in Rome says the European Union applies international law selectively, sanctioning some military invasions but not others.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukrainian missiles strike defense plant deep in Russia, Zelenskyy says
properties.descricao: Flamingo missiles struck the "Titan-Barricade" manufacturing site in Volgograd, Ukrainian president said.

properties.titulo_evento: In Strait of Hormuz, Renewed Strikes Threaten to Set Back Shipping Recovery
properties.descricao: The attacks came after traffic through the Strait of Hormuz had reached the highest levels since the start of the U.S. war in Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil Prices Return to Prewar Levels After Four Months
properties.descricao: The cost of crude has become a real-time barometer of the Iran war’s toll on the global economy.
